prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TINDER-STICKS-12-PACK-IR-TT Product Type: SOLID_FIRE_FUEL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Slow Burn Tinder Sticks Waterproof Firestarter Set for Camping 12pk Description: The ASR Outdoor fire starter tinder stick set was designed to be lightweight and compact, and will easily fit inside just about any pocket, bug out bag, camping bag or backpack. Keep them in your gear supplies while exploring the outdoors to ensure you have access to a heat source in an emergency.

Our tinder sticks are made of a non-toxic combination of wood, wax and paper that will ignite even if they get wet. The water-resistant design will provide a fire source in inclement weather an outdoor situations.

Even in damp conditions, just break one tinder stick into small pieces and expose the dry center to your flame. Each stick will take about 5 minutes to burn the exterior, providing you with access to heat in a small amount of time.

Taking just minutes to fully ignite, these fire starters will help build a fire in the rain, snow or wind better than other traditional magnesium and flint firestarters. Each pack comes with (12) four ounce breakaway sticks. Search Terms: fire starter survival tool flint firestarter flint and steel survival kit hurricane fishing fire stick lighter torch fluid camping accessories gear essentials stove grill supplies grills outdoor cooking survival gear kit equipment tools bonfire Features: - POCKET-SIZED FIRE STARTERS - ASR Outdoor fire starter sticks designed to be lightweight and compact, fit inside most pockets, backpacks, bug out bags and survival kits for emergency use. - NON-TOXIC MATERIALS - Water-resistant tinder sticks made from a combo of wax, wood and paper that will help them ignite even if wet. Count on these to provide a fire source in inclement weather and outdoor emergency situations. - EASY TO USE - Even in damp conditions, just break the tinder stick into smaller pieces and expose the dry center to your flame; it will take approximately 5 minutes to burn the exterior, providing you with a heat source in a small amount of time. - SLOW-BURN DESIGN - Taking minutes to fully ignite, waterproof tinder sticks will help build a fire in the snow, rain or wind while camping, hiking, backpacking and scouting. Pack comes with 12 breakaway sticks in total - SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 4" x .05" x .05"; Weight of each stick: 4oz; Sticks included: 12; Color: brown; Material: Wood, wax and paper; Water-resistant: yes === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12-Pack Brown Waterproof Tinder Sticks

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Fire Starter, Water-Resistant Wood And Wax, 12 Breakaway Sticks, Emergency Survival Kit

openai.title_differentiation: Water-Resistant, Slow-Burn, Non-Toxic Wood-Wax-Paper Blend, Breakaway Pieces, Emergency Camping And Survival
